title: COVID-19 mRNA Vaccine-Associated Myocarditis Presenting as STEMI in a 48-Year-Old Male.
summary: Case report of a 48-year-old male who presented with chest pain and EKG findings of STEMI shortly after receiving the second dose of the Moderna COVID-19 mRNA vaccine, subsequently diagnosed with myocarditis.
key_findings: Patient presented with STEMI-like symptoms and elevated troponins post-vaccination.
Coronary angiography revealed normal coronary arteries.
Symptoms and diagnostic markers resolved with medical therapy.
data_availability_statement: The data used to support the ﬁndings of this study are included within the article.
